zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecelia de Tangley於1208年出生在英國英格蘭素瑞格亞特 坦格利時，她的父親Richard de Tangley30歲，母親Agatha De Aguilon29歲。她於1231年與Henry de Weston在英國英格蘭素瑞阿爾布瑞結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1298年在英國素可瓦恩哈姆享年90歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tangley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an Americanized form of North German Tüngler (see Tingler ) or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.
English: variant of   Tinley  , or possibly of   Tingle  .

variants.name: Tingler
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): occupational name from an agent derivative of Middle English tingel, denoting a very small nail or tack, for someone who made, sold, or used such nails. See also Tingle . This surname has now died out in Britian.

Probably also an Americanized form of North German Tüngler: habitational name for someone from Tunglen near Oldenburg (Lower Saxony), or alternatively a topographic name for someone living on a tongue-shaped piece of land, from Middle Low German tungle ‘tongue’.

nameMeanings.name: Cecelia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecelia de Tangley was born in 1208, in Great Tangley, Surrey, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard de Tangley, was 30 and her mother, Agatha De Aguilon, was 29. She married Henry de Weston in 1231, in Albury, Surrey, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1298, in Warnham, Sussex, England, at the age of 90.

Elle a épousé Henry de Weston en 1231, à Albury, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1298, à Warnham, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 90 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Cecelia de Tangley(이)가 1208년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 그리트 탠글리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Tangley(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agatha De Aguilon(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1231년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 알버이에서 Henry de Weston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1298년 영국 수세스 워함에서 90세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecelia de Tangley родилась в 1208 г. в местности грит тангли, сурри, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard de Tangley было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Agatha De Aguilon, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry de Weston в 1231 г. в местности албури, сурри, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1298 г. в местности варнам, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 90 лет.
